item.title: [Segurança] Ivanti EPMM CVE-2026-6973 RCE Under Active Exploitation Grants Admin-Level Access
item.description:
🚨 Ivanti EPMM CVE-2026-6973 RCE Under Active Exploitation Grants Admin-Level Access
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
Ivanti is warning that a new security flaw impacting Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) has been explored in limited attacks in the wild. The high-severity vulnerability, CVE-2026-6973 (CVSS score: 7.2), is a case of improper input validation affecting EPMM before versions 12.6.1.1, 12.7.0.1, and 12.8.0.1. It allows "a remotely authenticated user with administrative access to achieve remote code
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/ivanti-epmm-cve-2026-6973-rce-under.html

item.title: [Segurança] Linux Kernel Dirty Frag LPE Exploit Enables Root Access Across Major Distributions
item.description:
🚨 Linux Kernel Dirty Frag LPE Exploit Enables Root Access Across Major Distributions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Details have emerged about a new, unpatched local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability impacting the Linux kernel. Dubbed Dirty Frag, it has been described as a successor to Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431, CVSS score: 7.8), a recently disclosed LPE flaw impacting the Linux kernel that has since come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability was reported to Linux kernel maintainers
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/linux-kernel-dirty-frag-lpe-exploit.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-41576 - Office
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-41576 - Office
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.1
Resumo:
Prior to commit 6c56603, the contact form is publicly accessible (no authentication required). User-supplied message text is passed through PHP's nl2br() function, which converts newlines to tags but does not escape HTML. The resulting string is then passed to a Blade email template using the unescaped {!! The resulting content is then rendered in a Blade email template using the unescaped {!! Because HTML is not san...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41576

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8261-1: Linux kernel (Xilinx) vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8261-1: Linux kernel (Xilinx) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Josh Eads, Kristoffer Janke, Eduardo Vela Nava, Tavis Ormandy, and Matteo Rizzo discovered that some AMD Zen processors did not properly verify the signature of CPU microcode. A privileged attacker could possibly use this issue to cause load malicious CPU microcode causing loss of integrity and confidentiality. (CVE-2024-36347) Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Securi...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8261-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8246-1: Vim vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8246-1: Vim vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Michał Majchrowicz discovered that Vim’s zip plugin could overwrite arbitrary files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to delete sensitive data or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-35177) It was discovered that Vim’s netbeans interface did not properly sanitize certain strings. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary commands. (CVE-2026-39881) It was discovered that Vim did not properly...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8246-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-6222 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-6222 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Forminator Forms plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in versions up to and including 1.51.1. This is due to the `processRequest()` method in `Forminator_Admin_Module_Edit_Page` (admin/abstracts/class-admin-module-edit-page.php) dispatching sensitive module-management actions — including export, delete, clone, delete-entries, publish/draft, and bulk variants — after only a nonce check, with...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6222

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-44349 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-44349 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Prior to version 0.11.5, processFuzzySearch in server/resource/resource_findallpaginated.go:1484 splits the user-supplied column parameter by comma and interpolates each segment directly into goqu.L(fmt.Sprintf("LOWER(%s) LIKE ?", prefix+col)) raw SQL with no column whitelist check. The entry point is GET /api/ with operator=fuzzy (or fuzzy_any, fuzzy_all). Any authenticated user — including one who self-registered w...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44349

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8259-1: OpenEXR vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8259-1: OpenEXR vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
Quang Luong discovered that OpenEXR incorrectly handled sample count accumulation when processing deep scan line image files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenEXR to crash, resulting in a denial of service, or execute arbitrary code. (CVE-2026-27622) It was discovered that OpenEXR had an integer overflow in the PXR24 decoder. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenEXR to crash, r...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8259-1

item.title: [Segurança] CISA gives feds four days to patch Ivanti flaw exploited as zero-day
item.description:
💣 CISA gives feds four days to patch Ivanti flaw exploited as zero-day
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
federal agencies four days to secure their networks against a high-severity vulnerability in Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) exploited in zero-day attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-gives-feds-four-days-to-patch-ivanti-flaw-exploited-as-zero-day/

item.title: [Segurança] New Linux 'Dirty Frag' zero-day gives root on all major distros
item.description:
💣 New Linux 'Dirty Frag' zero-day gives root on all major distros
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new Linux zero-day vulnerability, named Dirty Frag, allows local attackers to gain root privileges on most major Linux distributions with a single command.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-linux-dirty-frag-zero-day-with-poc-exploit-gives-root-privileges/

item.title: [Segurança] Canvas login portals hacked in mass ShinyHunters extortion campaign
item.description:
💣 Canvas login portals hacked in mass ShinyHunters extortion campaign
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The ShinyHunters extortion gang has breached education technology giant Instructure again, this time exploiting another vulnerability to deface Canvas login portals for hundreds of colleges and universities.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/canvas-login-portals-hacked-in-mass-shinyhunters-extortion-campaign/

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Multiple Vulnerabilities in Mozilla Products Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description:
📢 Multiple Vulnerabilities in Mozilla Products Could Allow for Arbitrary Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a CIS Advisories, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/multiple-vulnerabilities-in-mozilla-products-could-allow-for-arbitrary-code-execution_2026-045

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Auto-RAID in VMware vSAN for VCF 9.1 – Comprehensive System-Managed Data Resilience
item.description:
📰 Auto-RAID in VMware vSAN for VCF 9.1 – Comprehensive System-Managed Data Resilience
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
With every new release comes new features and enhancements. Some capabilities and their benefits are obvious, but target specific challenges and situations. Other enhancements seem subtle and perhaps easy to overlook, but impact multiple features, and benefit nearly every customer in their day-to-day tasks. The new Auto-RAID feature of vSAN in VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/08/auto-raid-in-vsan-for-vcf-9-1/
